title: Recycled scenes people
wikitext:
[]: Recycled scenes/people?             Quote Post by Jadley » Mon Jun 25, 2012 5:24 am I was watching 1.11 and 2.22 a few hours ago and i noticed something strange....... The crew members at the central dogma amazed by both the scene where Unit 01 is walking, moments after Sachiel exploded. And the one where Unit 01 is dismembering and tearing up Bardiel(Unit 03) seem pretty much the same to me, cept for a few environment changes, lighting effects and whatnot. here the images. crewmembers(2.22) SPOILER: Show
